analysis.rhyme_scheme: Chorus AABB (billboard/credentials, venue/settle), Pre-chorus AABB (clients/clients, go/more)
analysis.meter: trap cadence, triplet-adjacent, 8-10 syllables per line

chorus: I'm the type to put your case on a billboard (billboard)
I'm a lawyer, yeah, come check my credentials (credentials)
Yeah, I do commercials, and I know my venue (venue)
Jimmy or Saul, yeah, they both will settle (settle)
Man this case is getting so damn heavy on my back, gotta deal with it like Saul (Saul)
Got my clients going straight to the top floor, going up on a escalator
Skyler wants me gone, she tosses me like a literata
I will kick you out my office, I consult her to negotiate
